title: Create Vanilla+
description: This modpack provides a vanilla+ experience centered around the create mod. If you're looking for a modpack that doesn't stray too far away from the original minecraft experience but is full of quality of life mods, look no further!
body:
# Create Vanilla+
This modpack is built around the Create Mod, delivering a vanilla+ adventure full of quality-of-life improvements without straying too far from the game you already love.

### Perfect for:
- Players who are new to Create and want a smooth and immersive introduction
- Friends looking for a Create modpack that works well on servers
- People who don't have the most high-end PC and would usually struggle running Create

### Key Features

- Centered around the Create Mod with only the most popular add-ons.
- Carefully curated quality-of-life enhancements that respect the vanilla feel
- Lightweight & performance-friendly - optimized for smooth gameplay
- Shaders are not included, but fully supported as an add-on

### Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Core & Create Addons**

Create Fabric

Create Jetpack

Create: Steam ‘n’ Rails

Create Structures

**Quality of Life**

Advancement Plaques, AdvancementInfo, Almanac

Animal Feeding Trough, AppleSkin

Better Combat, Better Mount HUD, Better Statistics Screen, BetterF3

Blur+, Carry On, ClickThrough, Controlling

Detail Armor Bar, Durability Tooltip, Easy Anvils, Eating Animation

Elytra Slot, Extended Drawers, Healing Campfire, HerdsPanic

Inventory Profiles Next, Item Highlighter, ItemSwapper, JEI

Player Health Indicators, Presence Footsteps, Searchables, Shulker Box Tooltip

Tiny Item Animations, Tool Trims, ToolTipFix, Trample No More

TrashSlot, Traveler’s Backpack, Trinkets, Universal Graves

Visual Workbench, WTHIT, Xaero’s Minimap

**World & Exploration**

Ender Dragon Fight Remastered

Fabric Seasons (+ Terralith Compat)

Lootr, Monsters in the Closet, Terralith

YUNG’s Better Desert Temples, Dungeons, End Island, Jungle Temples

YUNG’s Better Mineshafts, Nether Fortresses, Ocean Monuments, Strongholds, Witch Huts

YUNG’s Bridges

**Performance & Optimization**

Bad Packets, Clumps, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine

Continuity, Debugify, Dynamic FPS, Dynamic Lights

Enhanced Block Entities, Entity Culling, FerriteCore, fast-portals

ImmediatelyFast, Indium, Krypton, LazyDFU, Let Me Despawn

Lithium, Memory Leak Fix, Model Gap Fix, ModernFix, More Culling

Remove Reloading Screen, Sodium, Very Many Players (Fabric)

**Server Utilities**

Essentials, Chunk Loaders, No Chat Reports, Not Enough Crashes, Server Sleep

</details>
